Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension

Interface IToStringMediator

All Known Implementing Classes:
ToStringFullParenMediator, ToStringMediator
public interface IToStringMediator
Common protocol for pretty-printing. Implementations allows building the result of toString() methods of formulas.
Since:
2.0
